features.name: single-element unpacked array with packed base type
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with range [0:0] where the element type is a packed type (byte, logic[7:0], etc.)

features.name: assignment pattern to single-element unpacked array of packed type
features.description: Code should include an assignment using a single-element assignment pattern to an unpacked array with range [0:0] where element type is a packed type

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
